nasb.text: He also removed the high places and the incense altars from all the cities of Judah. And the kingdom was undisturbed under him.

esv.text: He also took out of all the cities of Judah the high places and the incense altars. And the kingdom had rest under him.

cnv.text: 他又在猶大各城中，除掉邱壇和香壇。那時全國在他的統治下享受太平。

ccb.text: 他除掉犹大各城邑的丘坛和香坛，那时国中太平。
